executives.name: Lisa Pankratz
executives.background: Ms. Pankratz has over 30 years of experience in the investment management and financial services industry.

executives.name: Maryse Bélanger
executives.background: Over 30 years of experience in the mining sector. Former President and CEO of Augusta Gold and COO of Atlantic Gold.

executives.name: Peter Gillin
executives.background: Mr. Gillin is a corporate director and has served on several boards in the mining and financial sectors. He was previously Chairman and CEO of Tahera Diamond Corporation.

executives.name: Timothy Baker
executives.background: Timothy Baker has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of Kinross Gold Corporation and held various executive positions at Placer Dome.

executives.name: Dean Chambers
executives.background: Professional Engineer and financial executive with over 35 years of experience. Former CFO of Sherritt International Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
